name: Paczki (Polish Doughnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cream to lukewarm.
2. Add salt and egg yolks, and beat until thick.
3. Beat butter and sugar together in a large bowl.
4. Dissolve yeast cakes with 1 tablespoon of sugar, and mix thoroughly.
5. Alternately add rum, then flour and cream, beating hard until the dough blisters.
6. Place dough in a warm place to rise.
7. Punch down, let it rise again.
8. On a floured surface, shape the dough into balls, fill with pitted prunes, fold over, and cut into desired sizes.
9. Place dough on a floured surface and allow it to rise once more.
10. Fry in hot oil, turning once until the Paczki are very dark in color, ensuring they are thoroughly baked.
11. Drain on soft absorbent paper.
12. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
